result.stdout:
Usage: ez-tag [options]

Options:
  -p|--push                          Executes 'git push --tags' after adding the
                                     Tag
  -i|--increase <Major|Minor|Patch>  Auto increase the given part of the version
  -l|--lightweight                   Skip Tag annotation
  -?|-h|--help                       Show help information.

commands.payload:

  -l|--lightweight                   Skip Tag annotation
